# thoth_governance_packs (Data Source)

Reads available compliance pack catalog entries.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `packs_json` (String) Pack catalog rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total number of packs returned.
